content:
## Urban Pointe

## 1. Log in to propertyware :

Link- https://app.propertyware.com/pw/login.jsp

<!-- image -->

## 2. You'll land on the Dashboard (can be customized)

<!-- image -->

## Urban Pointe

## 3. Understanding the Main Menu (Navigation Basics)

Dashboard - Overview

Properties - Buildings & units Marketing- Listings, Prospects, Flyers, Campaigns Leases - All leases, Renewals Contacts - Owners, Prospects, Tenants Money In/Money Out- Bills, Payments Banking - Didn't explored Maintenance - Work Orders, Vendor Creation Management - Didn't Explore

## Urban Pointe

## 4 Adding Viewing Properties

<!-- image -->

5. Adding Units Inside a Property

<!-- image -->

## Urban Pointe

<!-- image -->

- ● Open a property
- ● Click Units → Add Unit
- ● Enter:
- 1. Unit number
- 2. Rent amount
- 3. Bedrooms/bathrooms

## 6. Adding Tenants (Residents)

<!-- image -->

## Urban Pointe

## Steps:

- 1. Go to Tenants → Add Tenant
- 2. Fill in:
- a. Name & contact info
- b. Assigned unit
- c. Lease start & end date
- d. Monthly rent
- 3. Upload lease (optional)
- 4. Save
- 📌 This activates rent tracking & reminders automatically.

## 7. Creating & Managing Work Orders (Maintenance)

<!-- image -->

## Steps:

- 1. Go to Maintenance / Work Orders
- 2. Click New Work Order
- 3. Enter:
- a. Property & unit
- b. Issue description
- c. Priority (urgent / routine)
- 4. Assign a Vendor
- 5. Save & send

## Urban Pointe

## 8. Adding Vendors (Plumbers, Electricians, etc.)

<!-- image -->

## Steps:

- 1. Go to Vendors → Add Vendor
- 2. Enter:
- a. Company name
- b. Email & phone
- c. Service type
- 3. Save
- 📌 Vendors can receive work orders via email .
- 9. Workorder Management

## Urban Pointe

## Attach Vender to WO:

<!-- image -->

Search vender, select it & save.

<!-- image -->

## Urban Pointe

## 10. Attach invoice to WO

<!-- image -->

- 11. Attach invoice directly to vendor
- ● Go to money out
- ● Select a vender
- ● open vender ledger
- ● create bill
- ● then fill all the details & attach invoice
- ● Save

<!-- image -->

<!-- image -->

## 12. Dropbox

- ● Before creating a Work Order (WO) or vendor bill, we first upload the invoice to Dropbox, organized by property address.

## Urban Pointe
